name: Can they fire me for missing work due to injury in Draper?
description: Possible if can't perform duties, but no retaliation allowed.[2]

mainEntity.name: Can they fire me for missing work due to injury in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Possible if can't perform duties, but no retaliation allowed.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: No automatic protection, but can't retaliate for filing claim; if can't do job, may terminate.[2] ADA for larger employers.[2] Key factors: Seek rehab via USOR if partial disability.[2] Document all.[2] Lawyer fights wrongful discharge.[2]
